name: Isaiah Berlin
bio: Sir Isaiah Berlin was a Russian-British social and political theorist, philosopher, and historian of ideas. Although he became increasingly averse to writing for publication, his improvised lectures and talks were sometimes recorded and transcribed, and many of his spoken words were converted into published essays and books, both by himself and by others, especially by his principal editor from 1974, Henry Hardy.

awards.name: Commander of the Order of the British Empire
honorary doctor of Tel Aviv University
honorary doctorate from the University of Cambridge
Honorary doctor of the University of Oxford
Honorary doctor of the University of Bologna
honorary doctor of the University of Athens
Honorary doctorate from University of Toronto
Fellow of the American Academy of Arts and Sciences
